model._hint: Base: Manojb/stable-diffusion-2-1-base (community mirror, original Stability AI repo removed). LoRA: artificialguybr/coloringbook-redmond-2-1v (SD 2.1 base, 512px). ~2 GB + LoRA; no sequential offload needed.

lora._hint: 0.9 default. Lower (0.7) reduces line-art effect; 1.0 gives maximum coloring-book look.

generation._hint: 30 steps recommended per model card examples. | CFG 7.5 per model card examples. Range: 6–9. | SD 2.1 base native 512×512. 768×768 also supported.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates clean black-and-white coloring book line art with blank fill areas — suitable for printing and colouring by hand. Outputs crisp outlines with no shading.
notes.prompt_guide:
TRIGGER WORDS REQUIRED: include both 'Coloring Book' AND 'ColoringBookAF' in every prompt. Examples: 'A cute owl, Coloring Book, ColoringBookAF', 'A roaring lion, Coloring Book, ColoringBookAF', 'A butterfly on a flower, Coloring Book, ColoringBookAF'.

Negative prompt: 'shaded, colored, gradients' can help enforce clean black-and-white line output.
